map.string: Name of currently selected water shader preset
S24 Advanced - Water color tint Alpha/strength (0.0-1.0). 0.0=no tint, 1.0=full tint effect
S24 Advanced - Water color tint Blue channel (0.0-2.0). 1.0=neutral, <1.0=less blue, >1.0=more blue
S24 Advanced - Water color tint Green channel (0.0-2.0). 1.0=neutral, <1.0=less green, >1.0=more green
S24 Advanced - Water color tint Red channel (0.0-2.0). 1.0=neutral, <1.0=less red, >1.0=more red
S24 Advanced - Fresnel power curve for water reflections. HARDCODED as 2.0 (df3*df3) in stock viewer! 1.0=linear soft, 2.0=normal, 4.0=sharp dramatic edges
S24 - Metallic factor for water surface (0.0 = dielectric glass-like, 1.0 = fully metallic mirror-like). HARDCODED as 1.0 in stock viewer!
S24 - Intensity multiplier for water reflections. Reduces or boosts reflection visibility. Lower = less mirror-like water.
S24 Advanced - Reflection color temperature/warmth. <1.0=cool/cold, 1.0=neutral, >1.0=warm/golden. Artistic color grading for reflections.
S24 - Direct roughness control for water (0.0 = use environment blur multiplier, 0.01-1.0 = override with this value). Controls surface smoothness.
Number of ray march iterations for water Screen Space Reflections. Higher values = better quality, lower performance.
Step size for water SSR ray marching. Larger values = longer reflection distance but lower accuracy.
S24 Advanced - Shore transition fade distance. HARDCODED as 60 in stock viewer! Lower=softer beach transition, Higher=sharper rocky coastline
S24 - Intensity multiplier for water specular highlights (sun/moon sparkles). Higher values = brighter highlights.
S24 Advanced - Underwater fog density multiplier. Controls underwater visibility independently. 0.3=crystal clear, 1.0=normal, 3.0=very murky
S24 Advanced - Wave animation speed multiplier. 0.5=slow calm water, 1.0=normal, 2.0=fast stormy water
